---
title: "Week 14"
subtitle: "Final Project Submission"
---

## Prepare

None

## Participate

🖥️ [Lecture 8 - Wood Buffalo TDM](/teaching/CIVE461/slides/lec-8.html)

## Practice

✍️ [IA 2 - Trip Assignment](/teaching/CIVE461/assignments/indiv_assignment2.html) - Submit on Canvas

<br><br>

::: {style="font-size: 0.875em;"}
Back to [course schedule](/teaching/ENCI707/ "Course schedule") ⏎
:::
